title: Travel Risk
description: Use this as a coarse pre-check before you spend time on destination-specific detail research.
assessmentDescription: Your current blended travel-risk score is about {{score}}/100.

success: Save offline maps and emergency contacts.
Recheck the forecast shortly before departure.
warning: Leave more schedule slack and reduce overbooking.
Check medication and supply availability in advance.
Lock transport and stay earlier if possible.
danger: Confirm backup plans for health care, transport, and weather disruption.
Reduce city-hopping and move key transfers into daylight.
If children or seniors are joining, verify support resources first.
